pi_items.source: Task description instruction and explicit check against the real Tor project URL.
Task description instruction explicitly requires this output file path.
Task description instruction explicitly requires this exact bookmark title.

Curl request to https://www.torproject.org/ returned Onion-Location header with a 56-character v3 onion address (http://2gzyxa5ihm7nsggfxnu52rck2vv4rvmdlkiu3zzui5du4xyclen53wid.onion/index.html) perfectly matching this pattern.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for tor_browser_env verify_onion_location_header task by confirming that the Tor Project website provides a real Onion-Location header with a 56-character v3 address matching the expected regex pattern. All required outputs (target site, file path, bookmark title) match the explicit prompt instructions. Additionally, discovered a critical defect where the task is entirely missing 'verifier.py', rendering it unscorable.
